interpretation_summary: The replication workflow stalled at the EXECUTE stage.  Investigators successfully cleaned up the preregistration file, generated a valid Dockerfile and created an analysis R script that faithfully implements the preregistered mixed-effects logistic regression and 2×2 mixed ANOVA.  However the container never finished a full run: earlier attempts crashed because required R packages (lme4, lmerTest, rstatix) were missing, and the last debugging loop ended after merely regenerating the Dockerfile (no image build / analysis execution took place).  Consequently no output file (tremoliere_replication_results.csv) was produced and no test statistics were computed.  No substantive comparison with the original claim could therefore be made.

fidelity_assessment.method_alignment: Intended code is in full alignment with the preregistration (mixed-effects logistic regression and mixed ANOVA using the same variables and exclusion rules).  All analytic steps are scripted in analysis_script.R exactly as planned.

deviations.issue_description: Execution never reached model fitting because key R libraries were not installed inside the container during the first attempt.
deviations.impact: High: no replication results were generated.

deviations.issue_description: The orchestrator originally tried to execute an .Rmd file as a shell script, causing command-not-found errors.
deviations.impact: High: blocked execution until converted to a proper R script.

results_comparison.hypothesis_tested: Mortality salience (death vs pain) will interact with scenario type (conflict vs control) such that death reminders lower utilitarian responses for conflict dilemmas but not control dilemmas.
results_comparison.original_results: ANOVA interaction: F(1,83)=6.89, p=0.01, partial η²=0.08 (negative direction; utilitarian responses decreased under mortality salience).
results_comparison.replication_results: No statistics produced – analysis failed to execute.
results_comparison.overall_answer: Inconclusive – replication could not be evaluated.

replication_report: Replication not completed: container building and package-installation problems prevented model estimation; therefore no claim about reproducibility can be made.

failure_handling.suggestions: Ensure Dockerfile installs all required R packages without version decorators (e.g., install.packages('lme4')), rebuild the image, and rerun the script.
Add explicit write.csv checks in analysis_script.R and make the file an artifact so that the orchestrator can detect success.

notes: Once dependencies are installed the analysis should run quickly because data are small.  After execution, compare the mixed-effects interaction coefficient sign and p-value and the ANOVA F-test with the original thresholds (direction negative, p<0.05).
